description: A composite request containing an ordered series of subrequests where later requests can reference the results of earlier ones using reference IDs.

allOrNone.description: If true, all subrequests must succeed or all changes are rolled back. If false, subrequests are processed independently.

collateSubrequests.description: If true, similar subrequests are grouped for more efficient processing.

compositeRequest.description: Ordered array of subrequests. Later subrequests can reference results from earlier ones using @{referenceId.field} syntax.

referenceId.description: Unique identifier for this subrequest. Used to reference this subrequest's results in subsequent subrequests.

body.description: Request body for POST and PATCH subrequests.

title: CompositeRequest
